task.title: Preset save scrolls to preset row

requirements.description: When saving a preset, automatically scroll the page to the preset chip row so the new preset is visible.
acceptance: Saving the current input as a preset scrolls to the preset row
Saving summary input as a preset scrolls to the preset row
The preset row has a stable selector id for scrolling
constraints: Only modify the lab project under G:\codex测试
Do not change any production project files
